cot_prefix: Okay, let's try to figure out where Eve is playing at the end of the match. So, we have five players: Alice, Bob, Claire, Dave, and Eve. Initially, they're assigned to specific positions. The problem says they swap positions in certain pairs during the game, and we need to track those swaps to find out Eve's final position. First, let me list out the initial positions: - Alice: fullback - Bob: center midfielder - Claire: right midfielder - Dave: left winger - Eve: goalkeeper Now, the swaps happen in a sequence. Let me go through each swap step by step and track each player's position. The first swap is Dave and Eve trading positions. So initially, Dave is left winger and Eve is goalkeeper. After swapping, Dave becomes the goalkeeper and Eve becomes the left winger. Let me note that down: After first swap (Dave-Eve): - Alice: fullback - Bob: center midfielder - Claire: right midfielder - Dave: goalkeeper - Eve: left winger Second swap is Claire and Bob trading positions. Initially, Claire is right midfielder and Bob is center midfielder. After swapping, Claire becomes the center midfielder and Bob becomes the right midfielder. After second swap (Claire-Bob): - Alice: fullback - Bob: right midfielder - Claire: center midfielder - Dave: goalkeeper - Eve: left winger Third swap is Alice and Bob trading positions. Alice was fullback, Bob was right midfielder. After swapping, Alice becomes right midfielder and Bob becomes fullback. After third swap (Alice-Bob): - Alice: right midfielder - Bob: fullback - Claire: center midfielder - Dave: goalkeeper - Eve: left winger Fourth swap is Eve and Dave trading positions again. Initially, Eve is left winger and Dave is goalkeeper. After swapping, Eve becomes goalkeeper and Dave becomes left winger. After fourth swap (Eve-Dave): - Alice: right midfielder - Bob: fullback - Claire: center midfielder - Dave: left winger - Eve: goalkeeper Fifth swap is Bob and Alice trading positions. Bob was fullback, Alice was right midfielder. After swapping, Bob becomes right midfielder and Alice becomes fullback. After fifth swap (Bob-Alice): - Alice: fullback - Bob: right midfielder - Claire: center midfielder - Dave: left winger - Eve: goalkeeper So, after all the swaps, Eve is back to being the goalkeeper.
